name: selfie-lib

metadata.name: selfie-lib
metadata.summary: Infrastructure for creating selfie-compatible test runner plugins.

documentation:
# selfie-lib

This package is the API and logic for selfie snapshot testing.

See the [get started guide here](https://selfie.dev/py/get-started).

classes.name: selfie_lib.Atomic.AtomicReference
documentation:
This has the same API as Java's AtomicReference, but it doesn't make any sense in the Python runtime.
The point of keeping it is that it makes the port from Kotlin more 1:1

methods.name: selfie_lib.SnapshotSystem.SnapshotSystem.source_file_has_writable_comment
documentation: Returns true if the sourcecode for the given call has a writable annotation.

methods.name: selfie_lib.SnapshotSystem.SnapshotSystem.write_inline
documentation: Indicates that the following value should be written into test sourcecode.

methods.name: selfie_lib.SnapshotSystem.SnapshotSystem.write_to_be_file
documentation: Writes the given bytes to the given file, checking for duplicate writes.

methods.name: selfie_lib.SnapshotSystem.SnapshotSystem.disk_thread_local
documentation: Returns the DiskStorage for the test associated with this thread, else error.

methods.name: selfie_lib.Roundtrip.Roundtrip.serialize
documentation: Serialize a value of type T to its SerializedForm.

methods.name: selfie_lib.Roundtrip.Roundtrip.parse
documentation: Parse the SerializedForm back to type T.

methods.name: selfie_lib.Roundtrip.Roundtrip.identity
documentation: Return an identity Roundtrip that does no transformation.

methods.name: selfie_lib.Roundtrip.Roundtrip.json
documentation: Return a Roundtrip that serializes to/from JSON strings.

methods.name: selfie_lib.SelfieImplementations.FluentFacet.facet
documentation: Extract a single facet from a snapshot in order to do an inline snapshot.

methods.name: selfie_lib.SelfieImplementations.FluentFacet.facets
documentation: Extract multiple facets from a snapshot in order to do an inline snapshot.

classes.name: selfie_lib.Slice.Slice
documentation: Represents a slice of a base string from startIndex to endIndex.

methods.name: selfie_lib.LineReader.LineReader.get_line_number
documentation: Method to get the current line number

methods.name: selfie_lib.Literals.LiteralString._parseSinglePython
documentation: combined logic from parseSingleJava and parseSingleJavaish
